girls_count.description: Number of girls in the class, used in the hypergeometric probability calculation as the size of the success group.

boys_count.description: Number of boys in the class, used in the hypergeometric probability calculation as the size of the non-success group.

sample_size.description: Number of children selected at random by the teacher for group projects (the sample drawn without replacement).

girls_selected.description: Number of girls in the specific combination being evaluated (2 girls chosen out of 10).

boys_selected.description: Number of boys in the specific combination being evaluated (4 boys chosen out of 12).
